queries.question: For each community, list the features they have.
queries.sql: select communities.name , features.feature_name from Communities_Features join Features on Communities_Features.feature_id = Features.id join Communities on Communities_Features.community_id = Communities.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?feature_name WHERE {
  ?communities_features a :Communities_Features .
  ?features a :Features .
  ?communities_features p:hasFeatures ?features .
  ?communities a :Communities .
  ?communities_features p:hasCommunities ?communities .
  ?communities p:name ?name .
  ?features p:feature_name ?feature_name .
}

queries.question: What features do all communities have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Features.feature_name  from Communities_Features join Features on Communities_Features.feature_id = Features.id join Communities on Communities_Features.community_id = Communities.id   GROUP BY Communities_Features.feature_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Communities_Features.community_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Communities)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the features every community has.
